temporal_description:
A man with short hair and glasses is shown in a close-up, side-profile shot. He is wearing a dark, high-collared shirt. The lighting is dim and cool-toned, casting shadows across his face and the dark, out-of-focus background. He is looking down intently at something in his hands, which are just visible at the bottom of the frame. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. White Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen. The camera remains static, focusing on the man's profile and his focused action. A man speaks in a low, calm, and serious voice, his tone filled with a sense of quiet determination and resolve. He says, "他死了四年，今天是时候了" (He's been dead for four years, today is the time). The background is silent, with no music or other sound effects, creating a tense and focused atmosphere that emphasizes the gravity of his words.

The camera angle shifts to a close-up, over-the-shoulder view of the man's arm and hand. He is wearing a gold watch on his wrist. He reaches down and places his hand on a dark surface, possibly a desk. The same white Chinese subtitles and the "风行网" watermark remain on screen. The camera is steady, maintaining a tight focus on the man's hand and the watch.

The shot changes to a tight, close-up view of the man's wrist and the gold Rolex watch. The watch has a white face and a gold bracelet. The man's hand is slightly blurred as it moves, adjusting the watch. The background is a dark, indistinct surface. The "风行网" watermark is still present in the top right corner. The camera is static, holding the close-up on the watch.
